jobBoards.name: Remote OK
jobBoards.notes: Returns array; first item is metadata object, skip it. Filter by tags.

jobBoards.name: Web3.career
jobBoards.notes: Also has tag filters via URL params

jobBoards.name: UseWeb3 Jobs
jobBoards.notes: No public API; playwright scrape or check for unofficial API

jobBoards.name: HN Who Is Hiring (monthly)
jobBoards.notes: Monthly thread; parse top result, then fetch comments from HN API. Pattern: https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/items/{story_id}

jobBoards.name: Wellfound (AngelList Talent)
jobBoards.notes: No public API. Check manually or via saved search emails. Profile already set up.

jobBoards.name: LinkedIn Jobs
jobBoards.notes: No public API. Set up job alerts for: 'Senior Backend Engineer remote', 'Blockchain Engineer remote', 'Backend Lead remote'

jobBoards.name: Work at a Startup (YC)
jobBoards.notes: YC companies; filter by role and remote. Worth a weekly manual pass.

jobBoards.name: Pallet (team boards)
jobBoards.notes: Many crypto teams run Pallet boards. Scrape individual boards or use their public listing.

jobBoards.name: Greenhouse (direct API — per company)
jobBoards.notes: Public API, no auth. Returns full JD content. Used for companies in the watchlist.

jobBoards.name: Lever (direct API — per company)
jobBoards.notes: Public API, no auth. Returns structured posting JSON.
